heading: Transfer to inactive status: initial service obligation not complete
label: 20107 Transfer to inactive status: initial service obligation not complete

children.heading: .—General Rule
children.label: a .—General Rule
children.text: A member of the Space Force who has not completed the required minimum service obligation referred to in shall, if terminating space force active status, be transferred to a space force inactive status and, unless otherwise designated an Individual Ready Guardian under , shall remain subject to order to active duty without the member’s consent under .section 20003 of this titlesection 20102 of this titlesection 20106 of this title

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to a member who is separated from the Space Force by the Secretary of the Air Force under .section 20503 of this title
